kpi_notes_im.kpi_01: 所选期间内记录的事件总数。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_02: 所有事件中已解决（已完成状态）的百分比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_03: 仍处于未关闭或待处理状态（尚未完成或取消）的事件的百分比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_04: 当前处于未关闭或待处理状态的事件数量。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_05: 已撤回或取消的事件数量。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_06: 标记有VIP代码的事件的占比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_08: 属于重复房间+类别+项目组合的事件的占比。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_09: 事件创建到首次调查更新之间的平均分钟数。
kpi_notes_im.kpi_10: 加权平均严重程度。低=1，中=2，高=3，严重=4。

kpi_notes_co.co_total_orders: 所选期间的清洁工单总数。
kpi_notes_co.co_completed_orders: 所选期间达到已完成状态的清洁工单。
kpi_notes_co.co_completion_rate: 所选期间已完成清洁工单的占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_avg_duration: 已完成清洁工单的平均完成时长。
kpi_notes_co.co_median_duration: 已完成清洁工单的中位完成时长。
kpi_notes_co.co_on_time_rate: 已完成工单中按时完成的占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_delayed_orders: 已完成但超时的工单数量。
kpi_notes_co.co_reclean_rate: 被标记为返工的清洁工单占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_inspection_pass_rate: 通过质检的已检工单占比。
kpi_notes_co.co_productivity_score: 每工时产生的清洁积分。

hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_01: 所选范围内的事件总案件数。良好：服务质量稳定且数值较低；不良：无需求增长背景下的持续增长超过前期的15%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_02: 人员配置和排队规划的运营工作量基线。良好：可预测的数量且关闭质量稳定；不良：超过计划容量的波动峰值。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_03: 在SLA规定规则内解决的事件的比例。良好 >= 95%；关注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_04: 衡量活跃队列中的干净关闭质量。良好 >= 95%；关注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_05: 事件后将服务恢复正常状态的有效性。良好 >= 95%；关注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_06: 执行健康状况的标准关闭吞吐量KPI。良好 >= 95%；关注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_07: 表明严重故障暴露的严重级别事件占比。良好 <= 1%；关注 1-2%；不良 > 2%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_08: 所有事件案件的平均严重度强度。良好 <= 1.8；关注 1.81-2.4；不良 > 2.4。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_09: VIP影响事件的解决质量。良好 >= 95%；关注 90-94.9%；不良 < 90%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_10: 品牌保护监控的高端宾客事件暴露度。良好 <= 6%；关注 6-10%；不良 > 10%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_11: 跨仪表板版本趋势连续性的兼容旧版VIP风险占比。良好 <= 6%；关注 6-10%；不良 > 10%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_12: 集中于最高部门的程度；高集中度意味着瓶颈风险。良好 <= 30%；关注 30-45%；不良 > 45%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_13: 与未解决根本原因相关的复发热点指标。良好 <= 15%；关注 15-25%；不良 > 25%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_14: 用于与历史报告基线进行纵向比较的重复负载占比。良好 <= 15%；关注 15-25%；不良 > 25%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_15: 用于优先改进渠道的最高投诉来源集中度。良好 <= 35%；关注 35-50%；不良 > 50%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_16: 当前未解决的未关闭工作负载压力。良好 <= 5%；关注 5-10%；不良 > 10%。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_17: 当前需要积极跟进处理的未解决队列大小。良好：稳定在接近零的水平；不良：持续多天/多周增长。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_18: 用于排班和人员配置的高峰时段负载标记。良好：每小时模式均衡；不良：与人员配置不一致的单一小时急剧峰值。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_19: 从案件创建到首次调查更新的平均响应延迟。良好 <= 30分钟；关注 31-60分钟；不良 > 60分钟。
hotel_im_kpi_notes.hkpi_20: 用于监控流程泄漏的已取消案件数量。良好 <= 2%；关注 2-5%；不良 > 事件总量的5%。

hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_03: (总案件数 - SLA违规案件数) / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_04: 已完成案件数 / (已完成案件数 + 待处理案件数) * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_05: 已完成案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_06: 已完成案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_07: 严重案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_08: 严重度评分总和 / 总案件数 (低=1, 中=2, 高=3, 严重=4)
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_09: VIP已完成案件数 / VIP案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_12: 最高部门案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_13: 重复事件案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_14: 重复事件案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_15: 最高投诉来源案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_16: 待处理案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_18: 高峰小时 = ARGMAX(小时事件数)
hotel_im_kpi_formulas.hkpi_19: AVG(首次调查时间戳 - 创建时间戳) 单位：分钟

kpi_notes_jo.kpi_02: 成功完成的工单百分比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_03: 在SLA内完成的工单百分比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_04: 以超时告终的工单百分比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_05: 升级处理请求干预的工单占比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_06: 跨团队重新分配的工单占比。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_07: 从创建到确认的平均分钟数。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_08: 响应时间的第90百分位数。
kpi_notes_jo.kpi_09: 从创建到完成的平均分钟数。

kpi_notes_mo.kpi_01: 所选范围内的维护工单总数。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_02: 成功完成的维护工单百分比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_03: 仍处于未关闭状态的维护工单百分比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_04: 已取消的维护工单百分比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_05: 标记为宾客相关的维护工单占比。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_06: 所有维护工单的平均严重度代理值。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_07: 最大维护类别所占的份额。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_08: 范围内活跃的不同维护类别的数量。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_09: 涉及的不同缺陷或资产组合的数量。
kpi_notes_mo.kpi_10: 所选期间内的日均维护工单量。

corp_kpi_notes.kpi_01: 综合企业健康指数，平衡严重度、VIP暴露度和SLA违规风险。基准：良好 >= 85，关注 70-84.9，不良 < 70。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_02: 分类为严重级别的事件的占比。基准：良好 <= 1%，关注 1-2%，不良 > 2%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_03: 用于公平连锁级别比较的跨酒店平均基准指数。基准：良好 >= 85，关注 75-84.9，不良 < 75。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_04: 涉及VIP宾客的事件的比例；追踪高端服务风险。基准：良好 <= 6%，关注 6-10%，不良 > 10%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_05: 基于违规/延迟/逾期近似状态的运营纪律KPI。基准：良好 <= 3%，关注 3-5%，不良 > 5%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_06: 已达到完成/关闭状态的事件的百分比。基准：良好 >= 95%，关注 90-94.9%，不良 < 90%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_07: VIP事件的解决效率。基准：良好 >= 95%，关注 90-94.9%，不良 < 90%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_08: 与忠诚度/留存风险相关的复发压力指标。基准：良好 <= 15%，关注 15-25%，不良 > 25%。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_09: 所选期间内的事件总数。基准：良好 <= 800，关注 801-1200，不良 > 1200（阈值应根据物业规模进行调整）。
corp_kpi_notes.kpi_10: 前5大类别中事件量的集中程度；较高则表示系统性集中风险。基准：良好 <= 45%，关注 45-60%，不良 > 60%。

corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_02: 严重案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_03: 各酒店平均 [100 - (严重度*40 + VIP*30 + SLA*30)]
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_05: SLA违规案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_06: 已完成案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_07: VIP已完成案件数 / VIP案件数 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_08: 重复投诉案件数 / 总案件数 * 100
corp_kpi_formulas.kpi_10: 前5大事件类别案件数 / 总案件数 * 100

chart_notes_jo.hjo01: 动画累计每周环形竞赛图，展示各服务类别的长期份额变化。影响：持续的累计优势揭示了结构性需求压力点。对策：针对累计增长持续的类别，重新平衡产能计划、库存和预防措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across categories with stable weekly shares; Warning: one category's cumulative share climbing every week (structural demand pressure).
chart_notes_jo.cjo01: 动画累计每周环形竞赛图，展示各服务类别的长期份额变化。影响：持续的累计优势揭示了结构性需求压力点。对策：针对累计增长持续的类别，重新平衡产能计划、库存和预防措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across categories with stable weekly shares; Warning: one category's cumulative share climbing every week (structural demand pressure).
chart_notes_jo.hjo02: 按周升序排列的工作负载柱状图与SLA合规率折线。 Benchmark — Good: SLA compliance ≥ 95%; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: < 85%, especially when SLA dips on high-volume weeks.
chart_notes_jo.cjo02: 按周升序排列的工作负载柱状图与SLA合规率折线。 Benchmark — Good: SLA compliance ≥ 95%; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: < 85%, especially when SLA dips on high-volume weeks.
chart_notes_jo.hjo03: 按周升序排列的工作负载柱状图与关闭率折线。 Benchmark — Good: closing rate ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% or falling while volume rises (backlog building).
chart_notes_jo.cjo03: 按周升序排列的工作负载柱状图与关闭率折线。 Benchmark — Good: closing rate ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% or falling while volume rises (backlog building).
chart_notes_jo.hjo04: 点击状态切片可下钻查看服务类别构成。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% of jobs; Warning: a large Open/Pending slice concentrated in one service category.
chart_notes_jo.cjo04: 点击状态切片可下钻查看服务类别构成。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% of jobs; Warning: a large Open/Pending slice concentrated in one service category.
chart_notes_jo.hjo05: 点击服务类别切片可下钻查看数量最高的服务项目。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single item dominates a category; Warning: one item is a large share of a high-volume category (recurring strain).
chart_notes_jo.cjo05: 点击服务类别切片可下钻查看数量最高的服务项目。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single item dominates a category; Warning: one item is a large share of a high-volume category (recurring strain).
chart_notes_jo.hjo06: 按周升序的工作负载（柱）与关闭效率（折线）。影响：工单上升而关闭率下降表明积压风险。对策：增加短期产能，优先处理积压工单，并强制执行每日关闭目标直至比率稳定。 Benchmark — Good: close rate ≥ 90% and stable as volume rises; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: close rate falling while weekly volume climbs.
chart_notes_jo.cjo06: 按周升序的工作负载（柱）与关闭效率（折线）。影响：工单上升而关闭率下降表明积压风险。对策：增加短期产能，优先处理积压工单，并强制执行每日关闭目标直至比率稳定。 Benchmark — Good: close rate ≥ 90% and stable as volume rises; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: close rate falling while weekly volume climbs.
chart_notes_jo.hjo07: 按周升序比较每周收件量与SLA表现。影响：高量周的SLA下降揭示了流程瓶颈。对策：部署应急方案，收紧交接SLA，每小时监控易违规队列。 Benchmark — Good: SLA ≥ 95% held through peak weeks; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: SLA < 85% or dropping on surge weeks.
chart_notes_jo.cjo07: 按周升序比较每周收件量与SLA表现。影响：高量周的SLA下降揭示了流程瓶颈。对策：部署应急方案，收紧交接SLA，每小时监控易违规队列。 Benchmark — Good: SLA ≥ 95% held through peak weeks; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: SLA < 85% or dropping on surge weeks.
chart_notes_jo.hjo08: 每周超时量趋势，用于及早发现服务中断。影响：超时激增会降低宾客满意度并增加重复联系。对策：确定根本原因周，修复路由/升级延迟，并设置超时激增的告警阈值。 Benchmark — Healthy: flat or falling timeout count near zero; Warning: any upward timeout spike week-over-week.
chart_notes_jo.cjo08: 每周超时量趋势，用于及早发现服务中断。影响：超时激增会降低宾客满意度并增加重复联系。对策：确定根本原因周，修复路由/升级延迟，并设置超时激增的告警阈值。 Benchmark — Healthy: flat or falling timeout count near zero; Warning: any upward timeout spike week-over-week.
chart_notes_jo.hjo09: 前10部门按状态构成的纵向堆叠视图。影响：特定部门的高未关闭/待处理占比表明队列拥堵。对策：重新分配工单，清除阻塞因素，并设置部门级在制品限制并每日评审。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% per department; Warning: a department above 30% Open/Pending (queue congestion).
chart_notes_jo.cjo09: 前10部门按状态构成的纵向堆叠视图。影响：特定部门的高未关闭/待处理占比表明队列拥堵。对策：重新分配工单，清除阻塞因素，并设置部门级在制品限制并每日评审。 Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% per department; Warning: a department above 30% Open/Pending (queue congestion).
chart_notes_jo.hjo10: 按前N类别显示需求（柱）和关闭率（折线）。影响：高量/低关闭类别是关键绩效差距。对策：指定类别负责人，创建操作手册，并按周跟踪各类别关闭率恢复情况。 Benchmark — Good: high-volume categories close ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: a high-volume category closing < 75% (critical gap).
chart_notes_jo.cjo10: 按前N类别显示需求（柱）和关闭率（折线）。影响：高量/低关闭类别是关键绩效差距。对策：指定类别负责人，创建操作手册，并按周跟踪各类别关闭率恢复情况。 Benchmark — Good: high-volume categories close ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: a high-volume category closing < 75% (critical gap).
chart_notes_jo.hjo11: 排名最高需求的服务项目。影响：项目集中可能造成持续运营压力。对策：将常见任务打包，自动化重复步骤，并为主要项目预先分配资源。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand split across many items; Warning: the top item exceeds ~20% of all jobs or shows a sharp daily spike.
chart_notes_jo.cjo11: 排名最高需求的服务项目。影响：项目集中可能造成持续运营压力。对策：将常见任务打包，自动化重复步骤，并为主要项目预先分配资源。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand split across many items; Warning: the top item exceeds ~20% of all jobs or shows a sharp daily spike.
chart_notes_jo.hjo12: 显示接收最高分配负载的部门。影响：负载不均可能导致响应延迟和职业倦怠。对策：重新平衡派单规则并交叉培训团队以吸收峰值。 Benchmark — Healthy: assignment load balanced across departments; Warning: one department above ~30% of assignments (overload / burnout risk).
chart_notes_jo.cjo12: 显示接收最高分配负载的部门。影响：负载不均可能导致响应延迟和职业倦怠。对策：重新平衡派单规则并交叉培训团队以吸收峰值。 Benchmark — Healthy: assignment load balanced across departments; Warning: one department above ~30% of assignments (overload / burnout risk).
chart_notes_jo.hjo13: 显示生成最多工单的请求发起部门。影响：大量需求源可能表明上游流程存在缺口。对策：与来源部门共同执行预防措施以减少可避免的请求。 Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across source departments; Warning: one source department dominates (upstream process gap).
chart_notes_jo.cjo13: 显示生成最多工单的请求发起部门。影响：大量需求源可能表明上游流程存在缺口。对策：与来源部门共同执行预防措施以减少可避免的请求。 Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across source departments; Warning: one source department dominates (upstream process gap).
chart_notes_jo.hjo14: 显示完成最多工单的部门。影响：相对于分配份额的低完成份额可能表明执行瓶颈。对策：比较分配与完成构成并消除完成阻碍。 Benchmark — Healthy: completion share ≈ assignment share per department; Warning: completion share well below assignment share (execution bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.cjo14: 显示完成最多工单的部门。影响：相对于分配份额的低完成份额可能表明执行瓶颈。对策：比较分配与完成构成并消除完成阻碍。 Benchmark — Healthy: completion share ≈ assignment share per department; Warning: completion share well below assignment share (execution bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.hjo15: 突出显示工单需求最大的位置。影响：热点若不管理会降低现场服务质量。对策：部署针对位置的人员、库存和预防性维护措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: one location is a clear hotspot needing dedicated staffing or preventive action.
chart_notes_jo.cjo15: 突出显示工单需求最大的位置。影响：热点若不管理会降低现场服务质量。对策：部署针对位置的人员、库存和预防性维护措施。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: one location is a clear hotspot needing dedicated staffing or preventive action.
chart_notes_jo.hjo16: 按部门的升级集中度，用于识别流程压力点。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% of jobs; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10%, especially concentrated in one department.
chart_notes_jo.cjo16: 按部门的升级集中度，用于识别流程压力点。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% of jobs; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10%, especially concentrated in one department.
chart_notes_jo.hjo17: 按部门的重新分配集中度，用于识别路由低效。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (routing / triage inaccuracy).
chart_notes_jo.cjo17: 按部门的重新分配集中度，用于识别路由低效。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (routing / triage inaccuracy).
chart_notes_jo.hjo18: 按类别的总违规分钟数集中度，含项目下钻。影响：违规分钟集中可识别SLA风险在财务和声誉上最高的领域。对策：优先对慢性违规项目进行流程重新设计和升级治理。 Benchmark — Healthy: breach minutes near zero and evenly low; Warning: minutes concentrated in a few categories (highest SLA and financial risk).
chart_notes_jo.cjo18: 按类别的总违规分钟数集中度，含项目下钻。影响：违规分钟集中可识别SLA风险在财务和声誉上最高的领域。对策：优先对慢性违规项目进行流程重新设计和升级治理。 Benchmark — Healthy: breach minutes near zero and evenly low; Warning: minutes concentrated in a few categories (highest SLA and financial risk).
chart_notes_jo.hjo19: 按类别的升级集中度；点击查看项目级问题领域。影响：高升级率表明服务不稳定或权责不清。对策：加强一线决策权，更新操作手册，明确升级触发条件。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% concentrated in specific categories.
chart_notes_jo.cjo19: 按类别的升级集中度；点击查看项目级问题领域。影响：高升级率表明服务不稳定或权责不清。对策：加强一线决策权，更新操作手册，明确升级触发条件。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% concentrated in specific categories.
chart_notes_jo.hjo20: 重新分配量最高的部门。影响：频繁重新分配会增加周期时间和问责缺口。对策：改进分配准确性规则、技能映射和接收时的分类质量。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (accountability gaps and added cycle time).
chart_notes_jo.cjo20: 重新分配量最高的部门。影响：频繁重新分配会增加周期时间和问责缺口。对策：改进分配准确性规则、技能映射和接收时的分类质量。 Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (accountability gaps and added cycle time).
chart_notes_jo.hjo21: 按部门的解决时长概况，用于识别长尾执行延迟。 Benchmark — Good: median resolution ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min or a long right tail in one department.
chart_notes_jo.cjo21: 按部门的解决时长概况，用于识别长尾执行延迟。 Benchmark — Good: median resolution ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min or a long right tail in one department.
chart_notes_jo.hjo22: P90解决时间展示按类别和项目的最差情况完成表现。影响：尾部解决延迟会导致投诉和SLA处罚。对策：针对根本原因项目制定专项恢复计划和更严格的完成SLA。 Benchmark — Good: P90 resolution ≤ 60 min; Watch: 60–120 min; Bad: > 120 min (worst-case completions driving complaints).
chart_notes_jo.cjo22: P90解决时间展示按类别和项目的最差情况完成表现。影响：尾部解决延迟会导致投诉和SLA处罚。对策：针对根本原因项目制定专项恢复计划和更严格的完成SLA。 Benchmark — Good: P90 resolution ≤ 60 min; Watch: 60–120 min; Bad: > 120 min (worst-case completions driving complaints).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-01: 外层环形图显示各酒店JO总量。点击酒店切片可下钻到前N服务类别。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread evenly across hotels; Warning: one hotel generating outsized JO volume (capacity review).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-02: 柱状图显示各酒店工单总量并由大到小排列。点击酒店可下钻至工单状态细分，再点击状态可查看24小时工单分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: every hotel Completed-dominant with Open + Pending < 15%; Warning: a hotel carrying a heavy unresolved queue.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-03: 柱状图显示各酒店工单总量。点击酒店可下钻至其24小时分布，再点击某一时段可查看该时段前10服务项目。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across hours; Warning: extreme peak hours driving concentrated item demand.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-04: 突出超时压力较高的酒店。 Benchmark — Healthy: timeout near zero chain-wide; Warning: a hotel with disproportionate timeout volume.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-05: 比较各酒店的升级率，用于服务稳定性复盘。 Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% per hotel; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% at any hotel.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-06: 带酒店标签的国家级地图，用于JO连锁可视化。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional demand; Warning: a property or region with outsized JO load.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-07: 统计集团所有酒店中需求量最高的服务项目。点击长条可查看该项目的每日工单趋势。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across service items; Warning: one item dominating chain volume or spiking on a given day.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-08: 比较各酒店从创建到确认的平均延迟。 Benchmark — Good: average response ≤ 5 min; Watch: 5–15 min; Bad: > 15 min at any hotel.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-09: 比较各酒店尾部响应时间。 Benchmark — Good: P90 response ≤ 15 min; Watch: 15–30 min; Bad: > 30 min (chronic slow-response hotel).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-10: 比较各酒店从创建到完成的平均时长。 Benchmark — Good: average create-to-complete ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-11: 比较各酒店的请求数量负载。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced quantity load across hotels; Warning: a hotel with concentrated demand needing resource reallocation.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-12: 每家酒店延误工单数量（delay_duration > 0）。点击柱状图查看该酒店24小时延误工单分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: delayed count near zero; Warning: a hotel or hour band concentrating delayed jobs.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-13: Completed job count per hotel. Click a bar to see its 24-hour completed job distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: completions track staffed hours; Warning: completion peaks in thin-coverage hours.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-14: Timeout job count per hotel. Click a bar to see its 24-hour timeout job distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: timeout near zero; Warning: timeout clustered at specific hotels or hours.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-15: 柱状图显示各酒店工单总量。点击酒店可下钻至工单状态细分，再点击状态可查看完成时长分布（< 15分钟至8小时以上）。 Benchmark — Healthy: majority of completions < 1 h; Warning: significant volume in 4–8 h or 8+ h buckets.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-16: 比较各酒店的主要JO服务类别。 Benchmark — Healthy: category demand spread; Warning: concentrated category pressure at a specific hotel.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-17: 比较各酒店的主要JO服务项目。 Benchmark — Healthy: varied item mix; Warning: one item dominating a hotel (candidate to standardize or pre-procure).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-18: 比较各酒店的来源部门JO负载。 Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across origin departments; Warning: one origin department dominating (upstream gap).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-19: 比较各酒店的分配部门负载。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced assignment across departments; Warning: a department absorbing disproportionate execution load.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-20: 比较各酒店的创建部门需求。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across source departments; Warning: a concentrated demand source (target for preventive action).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-21: 比较各酒店的完成部门产出。 Benchmark — Healthy: completion share ≈ assignment share; Warning: completion lagging assignment (execution bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-22: VIP job volume by hour of day across the chain. Click a bar to drill into the top service items requested by VIP guests at that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: VIP demand within staffed hours and handled fast; Warning: VIP peaks in thin-coverage hours (premium-guest risk).
chart_notes_jo.jo-01: 延误工单（延误 > 0）按时段（00:00–23:00）分布。点击时段可下钻至该时段前10延误服务项目。 Benchmark — Healthy: delayed count near zero and flat across hours; Warning: delay spikes clustered in specific hours (add peak-hour coverage).
chart_notes_jo.jo-02: Top 10 service item categories ranked by total job count (column). Click a category to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Good: top category ≤ 30% of total jobs and 24-h spread is even; Watch: one category dominates > 40%; Bad: a single category > 50% with a sharp peak hour (staffing gap).
chart_notes_jo.jo-03: Top 10 service items by completed jobs (bar). Click an item to drill into its completed-job duration distribution. Benchmark — Good: most completed jobs in the ≤ 30 min buckets; Watch: a growing 1–4 h share; Bad: a heavy 4 h+ tail for a high-volume item (slow execution).
chart_notes_jo.jo-04: Click a status slice to drill down into service category mix. Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% of jobs; Warning: a large Open/Pending slice concentrated in one service category.
chart_notes_jo.jo-05: Click a service category slice to drill down into top service items by volume. Benchmark — Healthy: no single item dominates a category; Warning: one item is a large share of a high-volume category (recurring strain).
chart_notes_jo.jo-06: Job statuses ranked by total count (bar). Click a status to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Good: most jobs in completed/closed status and 24-h spread is flat; Watch: timeout or delayed count > 10% of total; Bad: a growing open/pending share or timeout spike in specific hours.
chart_notes_jo.jo-07: Compares weekly incoming volume with SLA performance in ascending week order. Benchmark — Good: SLA ≥ 95% held through peak weeks; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: SLA < 85% or dropping on surge weeks.
chart_notes_jo.jo-08: Weekly timeout volume trend to detect service interruptions early. Benchmark — Healthy: flat or falling timeout count near zero; Warning: any upward timeout spike week-over-week.
chart_notes_jo.jo-09: Vertical stacked view of status mix across the top 10 departments by volume. Benchmark — Healthy: Open + Pending < 15% per department; Warning: a department above 30% Open/Pending (queue congestion).
chart_notes_jo.jo-10: Shows demand and close rate by top service categories. Benchmark — Good: high-volume categories close ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: a high-volume category closing < 75% (critical gap).
chart_notes_jo.jo-11: 柱状图显示各时段（00:00–23:00）的工单总量。点击时段可下钻至该时段前10服务项目。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across hours; Warning: extreme peak hours driving concentrated item demand.
chart_notes_jo.jo-12: Shows departments receiving the highest assignment load. Benchmark — Healthy: assignment load balanced across departments; Warning: one department above ~30% of assignments (overload / burnout risk).
chart_notes_jo.jo-13: Shows request-origin departments generating the most JOs. Benchmark — Healthy: requests spread across source departments; Warning: one source department dominates (upstream process gap).
chart_notes_jo.jo-14: Shows departments completing the highest JO volume. Benchmark — Healthy: completion share ≈ assignment share per department; Warning: completion share well below assignment share (execution bottleneck).
chart_notes_jo.jo-15: Highlights locations with the largest JO demand. Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: one location is a clear hotspot needing dedicated staffing or preventive action.
chart_notes_jo.jo-16: Escalation concentration by department to identify process stress points. Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5% of jobs; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10%, especially concentrated in one department.
chart_notes_jo.jo-17: Reassignment concentration by department to identify routing inefficiency. Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (routing / triage inaccuracy).
chart_notes_jo.jo-18: Total breach minutes by category with item drilldown. Benchmark — Healthy: breach minutes near zero and evenly low; Warning: minutes concentrated in a few categories (highest SLA and financial risk).
chart_notes_jo.jo-19: Escalation concentration by category with item-level drilldown. Benchmark — Good: escalation ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% concentrated in specific categories.
chart_notes_jo.jo-20: Departments with the highest reassignment volume. Benchmark — Good: reassignment ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–15%; Bad: > 15% (accountability gaps and added cycle time).
chart_notes_jo.jo-21: Resolution duration profile by department for identifying long-tail execution delays. Benchmark — Good: median resolution ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–60 min; Bad: > 60 min or a long right tail in one department.
chart_notes_jo.jo-22: P90 resolution time by category and item showing worst-case completion behavior. Benchmark — Good: P90 resolution ≤ 60 min; Watch: 60–120 min; Bad: > 120 min (worst-case completions driving complaints).
chart_notes_jo.jo-23: Completed jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into completion duration distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: completions track staffed hours with most in low-duration buckets; Warning: completion peak in thinly-staffed hours or a long-duration tail.
chart_notes_jo.jo-24: Acknowledged jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into response duration distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Good: response ≤ 5 min in peak hours; Watch: 5–15 min; Bad: > 15 min where demand is highest.
chart_notes_jo.jo-25: Escalated jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into overdue duration distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: few escalations with short overdue minutes; Warning: escalations cluster in specific hours with long overdue durations.
chart_notes_jo.jo-26: Total jobs by hour of day. Click a bar to drill into the top service item categories for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: hourly demand matches the staffing curve; Warning: demand peaks where coverage is thin (review shift boundaries).
chart_notes_jo.cjo-23: Completed job volume by hour of day across the chain. Click a bar to see the completion duration range (mins) distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: completions in staffed hours with most short-duration; Warning: long-duration share rising at peak hours.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-24: Acknowledged job volume by hour of day across the chain. Click a bar to see the response time range (mins) distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Good: response ≤ 5 min at peak hours; Watch: 5–15 min; Bad: > 15 min where demand is highest.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-25: Escalated job volume by hour of day across the chain. Click a bar to see the overdue duration range (mins) distribution for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: few escalations with short overdue minutes; Warning: escalations cluster at specific hours with long overdue durations.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-26: Total job volume by hour of day across the chain. Click a bar to see the top service item categories for that hour. Benchmark — Healthy: hourly demand matches the chain staffing curve; Warning: demand peaks where coverage is thin.
chart_notes_jo.jo-27: Job count by status. Click a status bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: Completed/Closed dominate and Open + Pending < 15%; Warning: a large Open/Pending status at specific hours.
chart_notes_jo.jo-28: Overdue job count (delay > 0) by service item category. Click a category bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: overdue count near zero; Warning: overdue (delay > 0) concentrated in a category or hour band.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-27: 比较各酒店的SLA合规表现。 Benchmark — Good: every hotel SLA ≥ 95%; Watch: 85–95%; Bad: any hotel < 85%.
chart_notes_jo.cjo-28: Overdue job count (delay > 0) by service item category across the chain. Click a category bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: overdue near zero; Warning: overdue (delay > 0) concentrated in a category or hour.

chart_notes_co.co-01: 按清洁状态分布的工单，并可下钻到房型。 Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominates with Pending + In-Progress < 15%; Warning: a room type stuck with a high pending share (release bottleneck).
chart_notes_co.co-02: 住客状态的工作量与平均清洁时长对比。 Benchmark — Good: check-out clean ≤ 30 min, stay-over ≤ 20 min; Watch: +50% over standard; Bad: durations well above standard for that stay type.
chart_notes_co.co-03: 已完成工单的时长分布，可下钻到各区间的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: most cleans in the ≤ 30 min buckets; Warning: a tail > 45 min or specific attendants concentrated in slow buckets (coaching).
chart_notes_co.co-04: 按小时分布的完成工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions peak during the AM shift with most ≤ 30 min; Warning: completion peak outside staffed hours or a long-duration tail.
chart_notes_co.co-05: 按清洁服务类型的平均耗时。 Benchmark — Good: full clean ≤ 30 min, turndown ≤ 15 min, deep clean ≤ 60 min; Warning: any type exceeding its standard (training or classification gap).
chart_notes_co.co-06: 房型工作量与平均清洁时长对比。 Benchmark — Good: standard room ≤ 30 min, suite ≤ 45 min; Watch: +50% over standard; Bad: well above (inconsistent SOP).
chart_notes_co.co-07: 住客状态分布，可下钻到清洁状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: check-out rooms clear quickly; Warning: check-out rooms accumulating Pending disproportionately.
chart_notes_co.co-08: 按服务员统计已完成工单产出。 Benchmark — Healthy: output balanced across attendants; Warning: a wide spread between top and bottom performers (workload imbalance or credit issues).
chart_notes_co.co-09: 准时与延迟完成的对比分布。 Benchmark — Good: on-time ≥ 90%; Watch: 80–90%; Bad: < 80% (guests waiting at check-in).
chart_notes_co.co-10: 质检通过/失败与返工压力同图展示。 Benchmark — Good: re-clean + inspection-fail ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% (training or equipment gaps, wasted labour).
chart_notes_co.co-11: 总量、已完成、延迟与返工工单的日趋势。 Benchmark — Healthy: completed tracks total with delayed and re-clean flat and low; Warning: a rising delayed or re-clean line over time.
chart_notes_co.co-12: 准时与延迟工作量对比平均清洁时长。 Benchmark — Healthy: fast + on-time dominates; Warning: a growing slow + delayed segment (critical), or slow + on-time (over-staffed).
chart_notes_co.co-13: 已完成工单的时间分布。 Benchmark — Good: behind < 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% of orders behind schedule.
chart_notes_co.co-14: 按小时与楼层展示已完成积分热力图。 Benchmark — Healthy: credit concentrated in AM hours evenly across floors; Warning: floors or hours with little output (staffing imbalance).
chart_notes_co.co-15: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: most orders complete ≤ 30 min through peak hours; Warning: a long-duration tail at busy hours.
chart_notes_co.co-16: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的住客状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: check-out cleans peak in the AM aligned to check-out time; Warning: stay-over backlog spilling into late hours.
chart_notes_co.co-17: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominates each hour; Warning: Pending / In-Progress rising during peak hours.
chart_notes_co.co-18: 按小时分布的完成工单，可下钻到各小时的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions spread across attendants each hour; Warning: a few attendants carrying the peak hours.
chart_notes_co.co-19: 按小时分布的完成工单，可下钻到各小时的准时/延迟分布。 Benchmark — Good: on-time ≥ 90% every hour; Bad: delayed share climbing in specific hours.
chart_notes_co.co-20: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁类型。 Benchmark — Healthy: cleaning-type mix matches the shift plan; Warning: deep cleans clustering in peak check-out hours.
chart_notes_co.co-21: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的住客状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: most cleans ≤ 30 min — use P75/P90 to set the SLA; Warning: a long tail for a stay type.
chart_notes_co.co-22: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: a tight ≤ 30 min cluster; Warning: specific attendants in > 45 min buckets (coaching).
chart_notes_co.co-23: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的清洁类型。 Benchmark — Good: each type within standard (full ≤ 30, turndown ≤ 15, deep ≤ 60 min); Bad: a type spilling beyond its standard.
chart_notes_co.co-24: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的房型。 Benchmark — Healthy: a narrow spread per room type; Warning: a wide suite spread (inconsistent SOP).
chart_notes_co.co-25: 按小时分布的延迟工单，可下钻到各小时的住客状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: few delays; Warning: a stay type generating delays clustered at specific hours.
chart_notes_co.co-26: 按小时分布的延迟工单，可下钻到各小时的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: delays near zero; Warning: delays concentrated on specific attendants or hours.
chart_notes_co.co-27: 按小时分布的延迟工单，可下钻到各小时的房型。 Benchmark — Healthy: delays minimal; Warning: a room type delayed repeatedly at peak hours.
chart_notes_co.co-28: 按住客状态统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: completions drifting into afternoon/evening (late delivery).
chart_notes_co.co-29: 按清洁状态统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: a cleaning status completing late in the day.
chart_notes_co.co-30: 按房间类型统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: a room type completing late in the day.
chart_notes_co.co-31: 按准时/延迟状态统计完成工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: on-time orders complete in the AM window; Warning: delayed orders drifting into late hours.
chart_notes_co.co-32: 按清洁类型统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: a cleaning type completing late in the day.
chart_notes_co.co-33: 按完成工单数排名前50的服务员，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: top attendants complete within the AM window; Warning: completions drifting into afternoon/evening.
chart_notes_co.co-34: 按住客状态统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min by stay type; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min.
chart_notes_co.co-35: 按清洁状态统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min.
chart_notes_co.co-36: 按房间类型统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min by room type; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min (suites set their own band).
chart_notes_co.co-37: 按准时/延迟状态统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: on-time orders cluster ≤ 30 min; Warning: the duration bracket where on-time flips to delayed reveals a mis-set SLA limit.
chart_notes_co.co-38: 按清洁类型统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min by cleaning type; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min.
chart_notes_co.co-39: 各楼层的完成工单量。点击楼层查看房务员，再点击房务员查看整体及按房型的平均清洁时长（分钟）。 Benchmark — Good: avg ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–45 min; Bad: > 45 min.
chart_notes_co.co-40: 各楼层的完成工单量。点击楼层查看房务员，再点击房务员查看其24小时清洁完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: cleaning volume concentrated in the 09:00–17:00 window; Warning: heavy activity in late-night hours.
chart_notes_co.co-41: 各督导的完成工单量。点击督导查看房务员，再点击房务员查看整体及按房型的平均清洁时长（分钟）。 Benchmark — Good: avg ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–45 min; Bad: > 45 min.
chart_notes_co.co-42: 各督导的完成工单量。点击督导查看房务员，再点击房务员查看其24小时清洁完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: cleaning volume concentrated in the 09:00–17:00 window; Warning: heavy activity in late-night hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-01: 按酒店分布的清洁工单，可下钻到清洁状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: every hotel Completed-dominant with Pending < 15%; Warning: a hotel with a high incomplete share (chain triage priority).
chart_notes_co.cco-02: 带工作量背景的酒店间清洁速度对比。 Benchmark — Good: each hotel's average check-out clean ≤ 30 min; Watch: +50% over standard; Bad: an outlier hotel well above (staffing or process gap).
chart_notes_co.cco-03: 按小时分布的完成工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions peak during the AM shift with most ≤ 30 min; Warning: completion peak outside staffed hours or a long-duration tail.
chart_notes_co.cco-04: 按酒店的清洁工单量，可下钻到住客状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: staffing matches each hotel's stay-type mix; Warning: a high check-out-load hotel without matching staffing.
chart_notes_co.cco-05: 按酒店的清洁工单量，可下钻到房型。 Benchmark — Healthy: duration expectations set per room mix; Warning: a suite-heavy hotel without a longer SLA band.
chart_notes_co.cco-06: 酒店已完成工单量与总完成积分对比。 Benchmark — Healthy: completion credit ≈ order count per hotel; Warning: high orders but low credit (shortcuts or credit mis-classification).
chart_notes_co.cco-07: 按酒店比较完成积分与工单产出。 Benchmark — Healthy: credit tracks throughput; Warning: volume high but credit low (volume gaming via low-credit rooms).
chart_notes_co.cco-08: 按酒店比较准时性，突出排班纪律与延迟压力。 Benchmark — Good: every hotel on-time ≥ 90%; Watch: 80–90%; Bad: a hotel < 80% (check-in failures happening today).
chart_notes_co.cco-09: 质检通过/失败与返工压力同图展示。 Benchmark — Good: re-clean + inspection-fail ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% (systemic training or policy gap).
chart_notes_co.cco-10: 总量、已完成、延迟与返工工单的日趋势。 Benchmark — Healthy: completed tracks total with delayed and re-clean flat and low; Warning: a rising delayed or re-clean line over time.
chart_notes_co.cco-11: 按酒店比较准时/延迟工作量与平均清洁时长。 Benchmark — Healthy: fast + on-time hotels dominate; Warning: hotels in slow + delayed (crisis) or slow + on-time (over-staffed) archetypes.
chart_notes_co.cco-12: 已完成工单的时间分布。 Benchmark — Good: behind < 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% of orders behind schedule.
chart_notes_co.cco-13: 已完成工单的时长分布，可下钻到各区间的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: most cleans in the ≤ 30 min buckets; Warning: a tail > 45 min or attendants concentrated in slow buckets.
chart_notes_co.cco-14: 按已完成清洁工单数量排名的前20名服务员树形图，方块大小和数值均表示完成件数。 Benchmark — Healthy: credit balanced across top attendants; Warning: extreme concentration, or high-volume low-credit staff.
chart_notes_co.cco-15: 基于完成缺口、延迟工作、落后完成与返工压力对酒店排序。 Benchmark — Good: low composite risk; Watch: mid-rank; Bad: top-ranked hotels need immediate intervention (delay + re-clean + credit gap).
chart_notes_co.cco-16: 按本地小时和酒店的完成工单热力图。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand peaks within staffed AM hours; Warning: hotels peaking outside coverage (deploy float staff).
chart_notes_co.cco-17: 比较各酒店的返工率、质检失败率和无质检工单量。 Benchmark — Good: re-clean + inspection-fail ≤ 5%; Watch: 5–10%; Bad: > 10% rework burden at a hotel.
chart_notes_co.cco-18: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: most orders complete ≤ 30 min through peak hours; Warning: a long-duration tail at busy hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-19: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的住客状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: check-out cleans peak in the AM aligned to check-out time; Warning: stay-over backlog spilling into late hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-20: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominates each hour; Warning: Pending / In-Progress rising during peak hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-21: 按小时分布的完成工单，可下钻到各小时的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions spread across attendants each hour; Warning: a few attendants carrying the peak hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-22: 按小时分布的完成工单，可下钻到各小时的准时/延迟分布。 Benchmark — Good: on-time ≥ 90% every hour; Bad: delayed share climbing in specific hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-23: 按小时分布的全部清洁工单，可下钻到各小时的清洁类型。 Benchmark — Healthy: cleaning-type mix matches the shift plan; Warning: deep cleans clustering in peak check-out hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-24: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的住客状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: most cleans ≤ 30 min — use P75/P90 to set the SLA; Warning: a long tail for a stay type.
chart_notes_co.cco-25: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: a tight ≤ 30 min cluster; Warning: specific attendants in > 45 min buckets (coaching).
chart_notes_co.cco-26: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的清洁类型。 Benchmark — Good: each type within standard (full ≤ 30, turndown ≤ 15, deep ≤ 60 min); Bad: a type spilling beyond its standard.
chart_notes_co.cco-27: 清洁时长分布，可下钻到各区间的房型。 Benchmark — Healthy: a narrow spread per room type; Warning: a wide suite spread (inconsistent SOP across the chain).
chart_notes_co.cco-28: 按小时分布的延迟工单，可下钻到各小时的住客状态。 Benchmark — Healthy: few delays; Warning: a stay type generating delays clustered at specific hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-29: 按小时分布的延迟工单，可下钻到各小时的服务员明细。 Benchmark — Healthy: delays near zero; Warning: delays concentrated on specific attendants or hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-30: 按小时分布的延迟工单，可下钻到各小时的房型。 Benchmark — Healthy: delays minimal; Warning: a room type delayed repeatedly at peak hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-31: 按住客状态统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: completions drifting into afternoon/evening (late delivery).
chart_notes_co.cco-32: 按清洁状态统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: a cleaning status completing late in the day.
chart_notes_co.cco-33: 按房间类型统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: a room type completing late in the day.
chart_notes_co.cco-34: 按准时/延迟状态统计完成工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: on-time orders complete in the AM window; Warning: delayed orders drifting into late hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-35: 按清洁类型统计清洁工单，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: completions concentrated in the planned AM window; Warning: a cleaning type completing late in the day.
chart_notes_co.cco-36: 按完成工单数排名前50的服务员，可下钻至24小时完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: top attendants complete within the AM window; Warning: completions drifting into afternoon/evening.
chart_notes_co.cco-37: 按住客状态统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min by stay type; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min.
chart_notes_co.cco-38: 按清洁状态统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min.
chart_notes_co.cco-39: 按房间类型统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min by room type; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min (suites set their own band).
chart_notes_co.cco-40: 按准时/延迟状态统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: on-time orders cluster ≤ 30 min; Warning: the duration bracket where on-time flips to delayed reveals a mis-set SLA limit.
chart_notes_co.cco-41: 按清洁类型统计完成工单，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: P50 ≤ 30 min and P90 ≤ 45 min by cleaning type; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min.
chart_notes_co.cco-42: 按完成工单数排名前50的服务员，可下钻至清洁时长分布。 Benchmark — Good: top attendants cluster ≤ 30 min; Watch: P90 45–60 min; Bad: P90 > 60 min for any attendant.
chart_notes_co.cco-43: 各酒店完成工单量。点击酒店查看楼层，点击楼层查看房务员，再点击房务员查看整体及按房型的平均清洁时长（分钟）。 Benchmark — Good: avg ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–45 min; Bad: > 45 min.
chart_notes_co.cco-44: 各酒店完成工单量。点击酒店查看楼层，点击楼层查看房务员，再点击房务员查看其24小时清洁完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: cleaning volume concentrated in the 09:00–17:00 window; Warning: heavy activity in late-night hours.
chart_notes_co.cco-45: 各酒店完成工单量。点击酒店查看督导，点击督导查看房务员，再点击房务员查看整体及按房型的平均清洁时长（分钟）。 Benchmark — Good: avg ≤ 30 min; Watch: 30–45 min; Bad: > 45 min.
chart_notes_co.cco-46: 各酒店完成工单量。点击酒店查看督导，点击督导查看房务员，再点击房务员查看其24小时清洁完成分布。 Benchmark — Healthy: cleaning volume concentrated in the 09:00–17:00 window; Warning: heavy activity in late-night hours.

chart_bv_co.co-01: #12 · Workload triage — reveals which room categories accumulate pending or in-progress orders; tells supervisors which room type to prioritise for early releases.
chart_bv_co.co-02: #5 · Labour model — compares check-out, stay-over, and vacant average cleaning times; every staffing and time-standard decision at property level rests on this differentiation.
chart_bv_co.co-03: #9 · Attendant speed — duration distribution per attendant with drilldown; primary coaching tool for identifying who needs mentoring vs who can mentor others.
chart_bv_co.co-05: #11 · SOP compliance — validates that full clean, turndown, and deep clean each meet their engineered time standards; deviations flag training or classification gaps.
chart_bv_co.co-06: #10 · Room-type SLA — confirms suites take longer than standard rooms; provides the evidence base for per-room-type time-standard negotiations with management.
chart_bv_co.co-07: #7 · Demand-quality — shows whether check-out rooms accumulate pending status disproportionately to pinpoint which demand type is causing the bottleneck.
chart_bv_co.co-08: #3 · Attendant ranking — identifies top performers for recognition and mentoring roles; surfaces low-volume staff for coaching or workload review.
chart_bv_co.co-09: #1 · Guest SLA — most direct measure of on-time room delivery; a large delayed bar means guests are waiting at check-in right now.
chart_bv_co.co-10: #2 · Quality cost — every re-clean consumes full labour with zero incremental revenue; inspection failures indicate training or equipment gaps.
chart_bv_co.co-11: #6 · Performance trend — daily volume and completion trend reveals whether the property is improving or degrading; feeds GM progress reporting.
chart_bv_co.co-12: #4 · Speed-punctuality — separates four archetypes: fast+on-time (benchmark), fast+delayed (scheduling), slow+on-time (over-staffed), slow+delayed (critical).
chart_bv_co.co-14: #8 · Floor productivity — shows which floors complete at which hours; reveals staffing imbalances and informs supervisor patrol and elevator-scheduling decisions.
chart_bv_co.co-19: #14 · Delay by hour — shows which hours produce the most delays; direct input for adjusting shift-start times and adding peak-hour reinforcement.
chart_bv_co.co-21: #13 · Stay-type distribution — full duration spread per stay type (not just average); P75 and P90 values set defensible SLA thresholds.
chart_bv_co.co-24: #20 · Duration spread by room — a wide spread for suites signals inconsistent SOPs; narrow spread confirms uniform room-type cleaning standards across attendants.
chart_bv_co.co-25: #15 · Delay-cause clock — shows which stay type generates delayed orders at which hours; enables targeted supervisor reinforcement at the right time.
chart_bv_co.co-28: #16 · Demand timing — shows when check-out vs stay-over cleans are completed through the day; drives early check-in feasibility and breakfast-shift sizing.
chart_bv_co.co-31: #17 · Delay hot-spot — identifies the specific hours producing the most delayed completions; primary input for shift-structure redesign.

chart_bv_co.co-37: #19 · SLA calibration — shows the duration bracket where on-time orders flip to delayed; reveals whether the current SLA time limit is correctly set.
chart_bv_co.co-39: #21 · Team Productivity Depth — three-level drilldown (floor -> attendant -> avg duration) pinpoints which floors and individuals run slow cleans for targeted coaching.
chart_bv_co.co-40: #22 · Shift Coverage Depth — three-level drilldown (floor -> attendant -> 24h clock) reveals when each attendant actually cleans, exposing shift-coverage gaps.
chart_bv_co.co-41: #23 · Inspector Team Productivity Depth — three-level drilldown (inspector -> attendant -> avg duration) pinpoints which supervised teams and individuals run slow cleans for targeted coaching.
chart_bv_co.co-42: #24 · Inspector Shift Coverage Depth — three-level drilldown (inspector -> attendant -> 24h clock) reveals when each supervised attendant actually cleans, exposing shift-coverage gaps.

chart_notes_mo.cmo01: 外环显示各酒店的MO总工单数。点击酒店切片可下钻查看其前N维护类别。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across hotels; Warning: a hotel generating outsized MO volume (chain benchmark).
chart_notes_mo.cmo02: 外环显示各酒店的MO总工单数。点击酒店切片可下钻查看其状态构成。 Benchmark — Healthy: every hotel ≥ 90% completed; Warning: a hotel with a large open or pending backlog.
chart_notes_mo.cmo03: 按酒店拆分的每日MO量趋势，用于连锁级别比较。 Benchmark — Healthy: stable daily volume per hotel; Warning: sustained spikes or recurring peak days at a property.
chart_notes_mo.cmo04: 酒店级完成率比较，用于了解维护执行健康状况。 Benchmark — Good: completion ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo05: 按酒店比较未关闭工单压力。 Benchmark — Good: open rate ≤ 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% (backlog pressure) at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo06: 附酒店标签的国家级地图，用于连锁范围内的维护可见性。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional load; Warning: a property or region with outsized maintenance demand.
chart_notes_mo.cmo07: 按酒店比较宾客相关与非宾客相关的MO需求。 Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low chain-wide; Warning: a hotel with rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
chart_notes_mo.cmo08: 各酒店间的平均严重度比较。 Benchmark — Good: average severity low and stable; Bad: a hotel with elevated average severity.
chart_notes_mo.cmo09: 按酒店的堆叠类别比较，用于了解维护需求集中情况。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across categories; Warning: one category dominating a hotel's mix.
chart_notes_mo.cmo10: 展示各酒店最高类别的支配程度。 Benchmark — Healthy: top-category share < 40% per hotel; Warning: > 50% concentration at a hotel (single-point demand).
chart_notes_mo.cmo11: 按位置或楼栋的酒店前N维护热点热力图。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across locations; Warning: a building or location hotspot needing preventive focus.
chart_notes_mo.cmo12: 连锁集团内最频繁的维护资产或缺陷的树状图。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
chart_notes_mo.mo-01: Top 10 maintenance categories by work-order volume. Click a category to drill into its job-status breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: Completed dominant per category with Open + Cancelled < 15%; Warning: a category with a high open or cancelled share.
chart_notes_mo.mo-02: Work order status distribution. Click a status to drill into the created-by departments responsible. Benchmark — Good: overall completion ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75%, or a department concentrating Open/Pending orders.
chart_notes_mo.mo-03: Daily MO volume trend split by hotel for chain-level comparison. Benchmark — Healthy: stable daily volume with no runaway backlog; Warning: sustained upward spikes or recurring peak days without staffing.
chart_notes_mo.mo-04: Top 10 maintenance defects by total volume. Click a defect bar to drill into its daily order trend. Benchmark — Healthy: defect counts flat or declining; Warning: a defect rising day-over-day (emerging systemic issue).
chart_notes_mo.mo-05: Top 10 defects by total work orders (bars, left axis) vs average resolution time in hours (line, right axis). Benchmark — Good: average resolution ≤ 4h; Watch: 4–8h; Bad: a high-volume defect averaging > 8h (resource bottleneck).
chart_notes_mo.mo-06: Top 10 maintenance categories by work order volume (bars, left axis) vs average resolution time in hours (line, right axis). Benchmark — Good: average resolution ≤ 4h; Watch: 4–8h; Bad: a high-volume category averaging > 8h.
chart_notes_mo.mo-07: Compares guest-related and non-guest-related MO demand by hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low and resolved fastest; Warning: rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
chart_notes_mo.mo-08: Average severity comparison across hotels. Benchmark — Good: severity index stable and low; Watch: gradual rise; Bad: a climbing index (escalating unresolved risk).
chart_notes_mo.mo-09: Distribution of work orders by resolution time. X-axis = duration buckets (< 1h to 24h+), Y-axis = number of orders. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets; Watch: a growing 8h+ share; Bad: a heavy 24h+ tail (process or resource bottleneck).
chart_notes_mo.mo-10: Number of work orders created by hour of day (00:00–23:00). Reveals peak maintenance request windows for staffing decisions. Benchmark — Healthy: request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours (adjust on-call and shift cover).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-01: Outer donut shows total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel slice to drill into its top maintenance categories. Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across hotels; Warning: a hotel generating outsized MO volume (chain benchmark).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-02: Outer donut shows total MO work orders by hotel. Click a hotel slice to drill into its status mix. Benchmark — Healthy: every hotel ≥ 90% completed; Warning: a hotel with a large open or pending backlog.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-03: Daily MO volume trend split by hotel for chain-level comparison. Benchmark — Healthy: stable daily volume per hotel; Warning: sustained spikes or recurring peak days at a property.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-04: Hotel-level completion comparison for maintenance execution health. Benchmark — Good: completion ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-05: Compares open-order pressure by hotel. Benchmark — Good: open rate ≤ 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% (backlog pressure) at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-06: Country-level map with hotel labels for chain-wide maintenance visibility. Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional load; Warning: a property or region with outsized maintenance demand.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-07: Compares guest-related and non-guest-related MO demand by hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low chain-wide; Warning: a hotel with rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-08: Average severity comparison across hotels. Benchmark — Good: average severity low and stable; Bad: a hotel with elevated average severity.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-09: Chain-wide distribution of work orders by resolution time. Click a bucket to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets chain-wide; Watch: a growing 8h+ share; Bad: a heavy 24h+ tail at any hotel.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-10: Chain-wide 24-hour work order distribution. Click an hour to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: chain request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours at specific hotels.
chart_notes_mo.cmo-11: Top 10 defects with resolution > 24 hours across the chain. Click a bar to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h at specific hotels (chronic failures).
chart_notes_mo.cmo-12: Treemap of the most frequent maintenance assets or defects across the chain. Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
chart_notes_mo.mo-11: Top 10 defects by count of orders taking > 24 hours to resolve. Click a bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h (chronic failures).
chart_notes_mo.mo-12: Treemap of the most frequent maintenance assets or defects at this hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates; Warning: one tile much larger than the rest (target for preventive maintenance).

chart_formulas_mo.cmo01: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then TOP category BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo02: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, then COUNT(*) BY job_status WITHIN hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo03: COUNT(*) BY created_date, hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo04: completed_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo05: open_orders / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo06: Country Value = SUM(total_orders) GROUP BY country_code; Label = CONCAT(hotel_code, total_orders) list per country WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo07: COUNT(*) guest_related vs non_guest_related BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo08: AVG(severity_weight) BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo09: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, category WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo10: MAX(category_count) / total_orders * 100 BY hotel_code WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo11: COUNT(*) BY hotel_code, location WHERE type = MO
chart_formulas_mo.cmo12: COUNT(*) BY defect_or_asset WHERE type = MO

hmo_chart_notes.cmo12: 连锁范围内最频繁维护资产或缺陷的树图。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-11: Top 10 defects by count of orders taking > 24 hours to resolve. Click a bar to drill into its 24-hour distribution. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h (chronic failures).
hmo_chart_notes.mo-12: Treemap of the most frequent maintenance assets or defects at this hotel. Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates; Warning: one tile much larger than the rest (target for preventive maintenance).

imc_chart_notes.cim01: 展示各酒店总数及前10事件项目，用于下钻优先级排序。基准：良好 前3项目 <= 酒店事件的45%；不良 前3项目 > 60%（集中风险）。
imc_chart_notes.cim02: 比较酒店数量和状态构成以检测关闭不均衡。基准：良好 已完成 >= 95% 且 待处理 <= 5%；不良 待处理 > 10%。
imc_chart_notes.cim03: 高端宾客风险与恢复有效性的双轴图表。基准：良好 VIP关闭率 >= 95%；不良 < 90%。
imc_chart_notes.cim04: 从酒店总数下钻至前10类别，用于根本原因治理。基准：良好 最高类别 <= 20%；不良 最高类别 > 35%。
imc_chart_notes.cim05: 按酒店展示复发压力，标记未解决的系统性问题。基准：良好 <= 15%；关注 15-25%；不良 > 25%。
imc_chart_notes.cim06: 附带酒店标签的国家级地图，用于跨区域高管可见性。基准：良好 单一国家不超过连锁事件的50%；不良 单一国家 > 70%。
imc_chart_notes.cim07: 酒店到部门下钻，用于运营归属对齐。基准：良好 无部门超过酒店事件的25%；不良 > 40%。
imc_chart_notes.cim08: 酒店到来源下钻，用于渠道质量控制。基准：良好 未知来源 <= 5%；不良 > 15%。
imc_chart_notes.cim09: 按酒店堆叠比较VIP与非VIP负载。基准：良好 VIP占比 <= 6%；关注 6-10%；不良 > 10%。
imc_chart_notes.cim10: 从酒店总数下钻至预订来源构成，用于商业洞察。基准：良好 未知预订 <= 5%；不良 > 15%。
imc_chart_notes.cim11: 在同一面板中比较风险、严重、VIP、SLA和趋势的高管矩阵。基准：良好 风险评分 <= 60；关注 60-100；不良 > 100。
imc_chart_notes.cim12: 按加权风险对酒店进行排名，用于确定干预优先级。基准：良好 高风险酒店数量逐期减少；不良 最高酒店风险周环比增长 > 10%。
imc_chart_notes.cim13: 用于战略风险分类的气泡象限图（高数量+高严重度=立即关注）。基准：良好 无酒店位于右上高风险象限；不良 多个酒店聚集在该象限。
imc_chart_notes.cim14: 区域矩阵比较严重、VIP、SLA违规和趋势强度。基准：良好 所有风险单元格趋势下降或保持绿色；不良 同一区域有2个以上指标为红色。
imc_chart_notes.cim15: 按酒店展示部门风险强度，用于针对性治理行动。基准：良好 最高部门风险 <= 酒店总量的20%；不良 > 35%。
imc_chart_notes.cim16: 对根本原因和累计贡献进行排名，用于改进优先级排序。基准：良好 前5原因 <= 45%；不良 前5 > 60%。
imc_chart_notes.cim17: 按酒店突出显示未解决的严重负担（时效代理），用于升级治理。基准：良好 = 0个未关闭严重时效；不良 持续 > 3个案件。
imc_chart_notes.cim18: 跨酒店部门矩阵，用于快速基准对比和不均衡检测。基准：良好 跨酒店差异平衡；不良 一个部门在多个酒店占主导地位。

imc_chart_formulas.cim01: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = TOP 10 COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY incident_item_name per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim03: VIP Incidents = COUNT(vip_code valid) GROUP BY hotel; VIP Closure % = VIP Completed / VIP Incidents * 100
imc_chart_formulas.cim04: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = TOP 10 COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY incident_category per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim05: Repeat Rate % = repeat_count / total_cases * 100 per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim06: Country Value = SUM(total_cases) GROUP BY country_code; Label = CONCAT(hotel_code, incident_count) list per country
imc_chart_formulas.cim07: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY department per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim08: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY source_of_complaint per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim09: VIP = COUNT(vip_code valid); Non-VIP = total_cases - VIP; GROUP BY hotel_code
imc_chart_formulas.cim10: Level 1 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code; Level 2 = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY booking_source per hotel
imc_chart_formulas.cim13: X=COUNT(cases), Y=AVG(severity score), Bubble=VIP cases, Color=country/region
imc_chart_formulas.cim14: Regional KPI = AVG(metric by hotel in region); Regional Risk = aggregate of weighted KPI intensities
imc_chart_formulas.cim15: Department Risk Proxy = COUNT(cases) by hotel_code + department (or weighted severity where available)
imc_chart_formulas.cim17: Open Critical Aging Proxy = MIN(critical_cases, pending_cases) by hotel (aging date fallback when explicit age not present)
imc_chart_formulas.cim18: Matrix Cell = COUNT(incident_case) GROUP BY hotel_code, department

cmo_chart_notes.cmo-01: 外层环形图显示各酒店的MO工单总数。点击酒店切片可下钻到该酒店的前N维护类别。 Benchmark — Healthy: demand spread across hotels; Warning: a hotel generating outsized MO volume (chain benchmark).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-02: 外层环形图显示各酒店的MO工单总数。点击酒店切片可下钻到该酒店的工单状态构成。 Benchmark — Healthy: every hotel ≥ 90% completed; Warning: a hotel with a large open or pending backlog.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-03: 按酒店拆分的MO每日工单趋势，用于连锁层级对比。 Benchmark — Healthy: stable daily volume per hotel; Warning: sustained spikes or recurring peak days at a property.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-04: 酒店级完成率对比，用于观察维护执行健康度。 Benchmark — Good: completion ≥ 90%; Watch: 75–90%; Bad: < 75% at any hotel.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-05: 对比各酒店的未关闭工单压力。 Benchmark — Good: open rate ≤ 10%; Watch: 10–20%; Bad: > 20% (backlog pressure) at any hotel.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-06: 带酒店标签的国家级地图，用于连锁维护可视化。 Benchmark — Healthy: balanced regional load; Warning: a property or region with outsized maintenance demand.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-07: 对比各酒店宾客相关与非宾客相关的MO需求。 Benchmark — Healthy: guest-related share low chain-wide; Warning: a hotel with rising guest-related volume (complaint risk).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-08: 各酒店平均严重度对比。 Benchmark — Good: average severity low and stable; Bad: a hotel with elevated average severity.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-09: Chain-wide distribution of work orders by resolution time. Click a bucket to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: majority of orders in the < 1h–4h buckets chain-wide; Watch: a growing 8h+ share; Bad: a heavy 24h+ tail at any hotel.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-10: Chain-wide 24-hour work order distribution. Click an hour to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: chain request peaks fall within staffed shifts; Warning: peaks in low-coverage hours at specific hotels.
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-11: Top 10 defects with resolution > 24 hours across the chain. Click a bar to see per-hotel breakdown. Benchmark — Healthy: count near zero; Watch: a few recurring defects; Bad: defects routinely breaching 24h at specific hotels (chronic failures).
cmo_chart_notes.cmo-12: 连锁范围内最频繁维护资产或缺陷的树图。 Benchmark — Healthy: no single asset or defect dominates the chain; Warning: one tile much larger (chain-wide preventive-maintenance target).
